reasoning: The corporate B2B/B2G brand requires an authoritative, functional, and highly clear interface. It's a technical industrial domain, fitting Archetype 4 for sober, engineered precision, avoiding 'dopamine' startup tropes.

body.usage: Paragraphs, labels, button text, data tables

spacing_and_layout.scale: Generous (2-3x normal). Focus on whitespace for a calm, uncrowded feel.
spacing_and_layout.grids: Bento-style layouts for categories (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4), tabular logic for tech specs.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Strictly limited. Use sharp edges or max rounded-md (6px). NO full rounded pills for cards.

surfaces_and_borders.cards: White surface (#FFFFFF) on Light Gray background (#F3F4F5). 1px border (#2B2E33 at 10% opacity: border-[#2B2E33]/10). No ambient drop shadows by default.
surfaces_and_borders.hover_state: Slight lift (-translate-y-1) and subtle, sharp shadow (shadow-md).
surfaces_and_borders.form_elements: Square or rounded-sm, 1px border, focus ring using Accent vivid green (#3E8E5C).

micro_interactions.compare_add_transition: Scale-in the 'Added' icon gracefully or a subtle border color shift to Accent (#3E8E5C).
micro_interactions.whatsapp_pulse: Continuous subtle ring expansion on the WhatsApp floating button (animate-pulse or custom ping ring).
micro_interactions.general: Avoid 'fade-in everything'. Use immediate responses or purposeful, localized transitions only.

page_components.header: Sticky header. White background. Left: 'DURU ULV' logo (Space Grotesk, #1F3D2B). Middle: Nav links. Right: TR/EN/AR language switcher placeholder + 'Teklif Al' primary button.
page_components.hero: Left: Bold messaging in Space Grotesk. Right: Large atmospheric background image (e.g., modern factory or greenhouse) with a dark green overlay or clean product image cutout. 'Teklif Al' and 'Ürünleri Keşfet' CTA buttons.
page_components.trust_band: Horizontal scrolling or grid of certification badges (CE, TSE, ISO 45001, vb.) and '36+ Yıl Deneyim' metric. Muted gray colors to avoid noise.
page_components.product_grid: 4 categories with custom Phosphor icons (duotone or thin weight). Clean, geometric grid.
page_components.product_card: White background, 1px border. Top half: large image area. Bottom half: Product Name (Space Grotesk), 1-line spec (IBM Plex Sans, #2B2E33/70). Action bar: 'İncele' (solid Accent green) and 'Karşılaştır' (outline).

product_detail.gallery: Main image + thumbnail strip below. White background for crisp cutout.
product_detail.action_bar: Sticky bottom or prominent right side: 'Teklif Al' (Primary) + 'Karşılaştır' (Secondary).
product_detail.specs_table: Two-column tabular layout for Özellik / Değer. Alternating row background (White / #F3F4F5).
product_detail.usage_areas: Icon grid (Belediye, Hastane, Sera, Çiftlik, Fabrika, Askeriye) using simple line icons.
product_detail.faq: Shadcn accordion styled with sharp corners.

page_components.comparison_page: Side-by-side table layout. Max 4 columns. Sticky headers with product images and 'Teklif Al' button per column. Actions: 'Tümünü Temizle', 'Yazdır'.
page_components.quote_form: Minimalist, strictly validated. 'D63B2F' for error borders/text. KVKK checkbox. List of selected products embedded.
page_components.footer: Dark green (#1F3D2B) background, white text. Grid layout for Links, Certifications, Legal.

hero_backgrounds.description: Industrial factory exterior for generic B2B/B2G trust background
Modern greenhouse for agricultural sector usage area
Empty clean hospital corridor for medical/public sector usage area

products.description: NOTE: User provided 4 product images of Duru industrial spraying machines (green/yellow equipment on white background). Ensure white-background images blend perfectly into the #FFFFFF product cards.

anti_patterns: NO purple-blue gradients or glossy glassmorphism.
NO red, yellow, or orange colors except for form validation errors (#D63B2F).
NO 'fade-in' cascade animations that make the site feel like a template.

technical_instructions.framework: React with Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI.
technical_instructions.styling: Use raw Tailwind for layout containers. Customize Shadcn components (strip out excess rounding and default Vercel shadow, apply our 1px border rule).
technical_instructions.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (regular or light weight) for a technical feel.
technical_instructions.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, form inputs, toggles, accordion headers) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='product-compare-btn').
